book.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.summary: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

book.title: The Great Gatsby
book.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
book.summary: A story of the Jazz Age and the American Dream.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.summary: A novel about racial injustice in the Deep South, seen through the eyes of a young girl.

book.title: The Hobbit
book.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
book.summary: A hobbit embarks on a quest to reclaim a treasure guarded by a dragon.

book.title: Pride and Prejudice
book.author: Jane Austen
book.summary: A classic novel about love and social standing in 19th century England.
